ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fish" (
  "fish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fish */,
  "tag_code" TEXT /* Unique tag code assigned to the fish */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the fish species */,
  "rearing_type_name" TEXT /* Type of rearing (e.g., Wild Fish or Natural Production) */,
  "initial_mark_site_code" TEXT /* Code of the site where the fish was initially marked */,
  "initial_mark_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the fish was initially marked */,
  "initial_length_mm" INTEGER /* Initial length of the fish in millimeters */,
  "initial_weight_g" REAL /* Initial weight of the fish in grams */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the fish (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "genetic_stock" TEXT /* Genetic stock of the fish */,
  "fin_clip_code" TEXT /* Fin clip code (e.g., Left Pectoral, Right Pectoral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fish_rearing_type_name FOREIGN KEY ("rearing_type_name") REFERENCES rearing_types ("rearing_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fish_species_name FOREIGN KEY ("species_name") REFERENCES species ("species_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "species_description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rearing_types" (
  "rearing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rearing type */,
  "rearing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the rearing type */,
  "rearing_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the rearing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rearing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "fish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fish associated with the event */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Mark, Recapture) */,
  "event_site_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the site type where the event occurred (e.g., Trap or Weir, River) */,
  "event_site_code_value" TEXT /* Code of the site where the event occurred */,
  "event_date_time_value" TEXT /* Date and time when the event occurred */,
  "event_release_site_code_code" TEXT /* Code of the site where the fish was released */,
  "event_release_date_time_value" TEXT /* Date and time when the fish was released */,
  "event_length_mm" INTEGER /* Length of the fish in millimeters at the time of the event */,
  "event_weight_g" REAL /* Weight of the fish in grams at the time of the event */,
  "cth_count" INTEGER /* CTH count, a measure of fish health */,
  "water_temperature_c" REAL /* Water temperature in Celsius at the time of the event */,
  "water_depth_m" REAL /* Water depth in meters at the time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_fish_id FOREIGN KEY ("fish_id") REFERENCES fish ("fish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_name FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_name") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_site_code_value FOREIGN KEY ("event_site_code_value") REFERENCES sites ("site_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_release_site_code_code FOREIGN KEY ("event_release_site_code_code") REFERENCES sites ("site_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "event_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code of the site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the site type (e.g., Trap or Weir, River) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_types" (
  "site_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site type */,
  "site_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the site type */,
  "site_type_code" TEXT /* Code of the site type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antennas" (
  "antenna_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antenna */,
  "antenna_code" TEXT /* Code of the antenna */,
  "antenna_group_configuration_value" INTEGER /* Configuration value of the antenna group */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the antenna is located */,
  "antenna_type" TEXT /* Type of the antenna (e.g., Whip, Yagi) */,
  "frequency_mhz" REAL /* Frequency of the antenna in MHz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antenna_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antennas_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
